arts.ttl: How to watch Brighton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Brighton vs Wolves kicks off at 7.45pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7.15pm. Wolves continue their Carabao Cup campaign with a third round match away to Brighton & Hove Albion on Wednesday evening - find out how to follow the live action below.

arts.ttl: The staggering number of tickets Brighton must sell to recoup Georginio Rutter transfer fee
arts.sum: It would take a fair few tickets for the Albion to recuperate their money back from record-signing Georginio Rutter!

arts.ttl: Fabian Hurzeler reacts to biggest injury blow to date as selection process revealed ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: Brighton welcome Wolves to the Amex Stadium tonight for the third round of the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic snap up free agent following Brighton exit
arts.sum: Charlton Athletic have signed goalkeeper Tommy Reid following his exit from Brighton and Hove Albion, as confirmed by… The post Charlton Athletic snap up free agent following Brighton exit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Brighton blueprint that comes with £10m Hearts investment earns 'enthusiastic' response as David Weir factor hyped
arts.sum: Brighton owner and chairman Tony Bloom is in talks over an investment in the Jambos

arts.ttl: 'I don't like it': Referee Chris Kavanagh told Declan Rice he did NOT want to send him off against Brighton but Howard Webb explains why the Arsenal star was correctly shown red
arts.sum: Rice was issued with a yellow card in the first half for a late challenge on Joel Veltman, who was also involved in the incident that resulted in Rice receiving his second booking after half-time.

arts.ttl: Match Officials Mic'd Up: Webb analyses key incidents in MW1-3
arts.sum: What the match officials did: Referee Chris Kavanagh spots that Rice kicks the ball away before Veltman catches him, he then issues Rice a second yellow card for delaying the restart of play. What the match officials did: The assistant referee says the ball strikes Kovacic but believes his arm is in a natural position and the ball comes at him at speed.

arts.ttl: Ref told Rice: 'I don't like the rule' as he sent him off vs Brighton
arts.sum: Referee Chris Kavanagh told Declan Rice he "doesn't like the rule" for booking players who delay restarts - as the official sent the Arsenal midfielder off for a second yellow in the Gunners' 1-1 draw with Brighton last month.

arts.ttl: Brighton facing dilemma after latest injury concern and another £25m signing ruled out ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: All the latest team news for Brighton and Hove Albion ahead of their Carabao Cup clash with Wolves

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: New contract, loan exit announced for two fringe players
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers announce that they have agreed a new contract with a fringe senior player and found a loan move for one of their prospects.
